# Let's open and display the content with indices to help annotate.
path = "/mnt/data/file-WzG5nfqbra7gfiRS2gXpPu-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

# find double-quote segments
quote_positions = [i for i,ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
len(quote_positions), quote_positions[:10], quote_positions[-10:]

# extract pairs sequentially
paired = []
i = 0
while i < len(quote_positions)-1:
    start = quote_positions[i]
    end = quote_positions[i+1]
    # ensure they are paired: 
    paired.append((start, end))
    i += 2
paired

# extract hadith segments in quoted pairs
hads = []
for (open_q, close_q) in paired:
    s, st, en = extract(open_q, close_q, exclude_edges=1)
    hads.append((st,en,s))
# last unmatched
last_open = quote_positions[-1]
s_last, st_last, en_last = extract(last_open, None, exclude_edges=1)
hads, (st_last, en_last, s_last)

citations = []
# add ayahs
for st,en,s in ayahs:
    citations.append({"span_start": st, "span_end": en, "span_text": s, "citation_type": "Aya"})
# add hadiths
for st,en,s in hads:
    citations.append({"span_start": st, "span_end": en, "span_text": s, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})
# sort by span_start
citations = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
import json, textwrap, pprint
json_str = json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False)
json_str[:500]

citations = []
# ayahs
for st,en,s in ayahs:
    citations.append({"span_start": st, "span_end": en, "span_text": s, "citation_type": "Aya"})
# hadiths: pairs
for (open_q, close_q) in paired:
    s, st, en = extract(open_q, close_q, exclude_edges=1)
    citations.append({"span_start": st, "span_end": en, "span_text": s, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})
# unmatched last if exists
if len(quote_positions) % 2 == 1:
    last_open = quote_positions[-1]
    s_last, st_last, en_last = extract(last_open, None, exclude_edges=1)
    citations.append({"span_start": st_last, "span_end": en_last, "span_text": s_last, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})
# sort
citations = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
print(len(citations))
print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":156,"span_end":284,"span_text":"قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ لِمَ تَعْجَبُونَ مِنْ أَنْ يَأْتِيَكُمْ رِجَالٌ يَنْصُرُونَ مِنْ عِنْدِ اللَّهِ وَبَشِّرُوهُمْ بِقَدَرٍ عَظِيمٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":297,"span_end":575,"span_text":"وَقَالَ يَا قَوْمِ إِنَّ هَذَا إِلًا مِنَ رَسُولٍ إِنَّهُ يَأْتِيَكُمْ بِآيَةٍ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ وَاللَّهُ يَرْزُقُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَمَا أَنْعَمْتُمْ فَأَنْعَمْ لِأُولِيَ الْأَلْوَانِ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَزِدْ لَهُمْ فَضْلًا وَلا تَمُدَّ وَصْفًا لِنَفْسِكَ فَيَصْبَحَ مِنَ الْمُخْتَالِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":667,"span_end":864,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ أَخَذَ مِنَ النُجومِ وَإِنَّما نَزَلَتِ النُجومُ عَلَيْهِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَخَذَ مِنَ النُجومِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":968,"span_end":1038,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1114,"span_end":1280,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأُذِنَ لَهُ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأُذِنَ لَهُ بِالنُجومِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1382,"span_end":1452,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1520,"span_end":1590,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1654,"span_end":1724,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1792,"span_end":1812,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
